code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing input")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing target")?
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let p = parts.get(i).ok_or("oob")?
    let n = string.parse_int(p).ok_or("bad int")?
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  let target = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("bad target")?
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(idx)
    println("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
